name: Carbon/Graphite Raman
description: Raman peak assignments for carbon and graphite samples. Includes PPTX bands and common reference markers for disordered/graphitic carbon.

assignments.name: Carbon D band (disorder-induced)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 1300-1370 cm-1. Use with G band for ID/IG ratio.

assignments.name: Carbon D3 band (amorphous sp2 carbon)
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Broad amorphous/disordered carbon component near the G band.

assignments.name: Carbon G band (graphitic sp2)
assignments.note: PPTX range: 1580-1600 cm-1. Use with D band for ID/IG ratio.

assignments.name: Carbon D' band (defect-related graphite)
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Defect-related shoulder commonly observed near the G band.

assignments.name: Carbon second-order band near 2450
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Second-order graphitic/carbon band.

assignments.name: Carbon D+G combination band
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Combination band often observed in graphitic/disordered carbon.

assignments.name: Carbon 2D' band
assignments.note: Reference marker outside PPTX. Higher-order graphitic carbon band.
